DataRequest.Name: Excessive Web Request Failures / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Calls to one or more web server URIs has returned a status code other than 200/300 or 500 greater than 90 times in a 3 minute interval.
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Excessive request failures from source $srcIpAddr to server $incidentRptDevName with status $httpStatusCode
DataRequest.Remediation: Investigate the error codes and confirm why they are occurring.

SubPattern.name: excessive_error_codes2018
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType CONTAIN "IIS-" AND (srcIpAddr NOT IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET) OR (httpForwardAddr IS NOT NULL AND httpForwardAddr!=185.17.230.166 AND httpForwardAddr!=63.143.42.242)) AND httpStatusCode NOT IN ("200","201","202","204","301","302","304","500","501","502","503","504","505","506","507","508","510","511")

SubPattern.name: excessive_error_code2003
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: (eventType CONTAIN "IIS-" OR eventType CONTAIN "Apache-" OR eventType="SophosXG-Generic") AND srcIpAddr NOT IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET) AND httpStatusCode NOT IN ("200","201","202","204","301","302","304","500","501","502","503","504","505","506","507","508","510","511")
